title: Knocked Down!
description: This mod adds a "Knocked Down" state for players, similar to battle royale games
body:
# Knocked Down!
**Tired of dying? Become Knocked Down! instead**

## Features
This mod adds a vanilla friendly configurable **Knocked Down!** state into the game.

**Knocked Down! mechanic** - When a player would be to die, they are instead put into a knocked down state, making them crawl on the ground, unable to interact with the enviroment and will recieve several debuffs.
A timer will then begin, displayed on the **XP Bar** and can be revived by ther players before it runs out.

**Revival mechanic** - Another player can revive a knocked down player by holding shift and right clicking on them, this will prevent them from dying and revive them. The only penalty for being revived is that you lose your current XP level progress.

(if you were level 10 with 50% towards level 11, you will stay at level 10 with 0% towards level 11)


## Configuration

**knockeddownDuration** - this lets you configure for how long a player should stay knocked down before they die. (default 10 seconds)

**PvPDamageOnly** - This decides if player can be knocked down by enviromental damage.

- **true** - if true, only damage from other players can knock down a player. Damage from other sources will kill them instantly
- **false** - if false, any type of damage can knock down a player, regardless of source.

(default false)

## Releases

I will release new versions of this mod or updates for new minecraft versions when i feel like it. Do not expect me to update it consistently, even though i will try.

If you  have any recommendations for updates, feel free to message me through GitHub.
